block_00: Consumer staples that are always in demand
block_01: Cosmetic companies don’t just produce makeup, but they also specialize in such undeniably important necessities like shower and bath products, skincare, deodorants, shaving and cleaning supplies. This industry is called consumer staples for a reason — consumers are unwilling or unable to cut these products out of their budget.
block_02: Products that are at a relatively constant demand might make their producers attractive candidates for shareholders and traders. Which beauty stocks are available on IQ Option and what are their strengths and weaknesses?
block_03: To find out, check the full article on the website and discover a new industry.
